note: Explorer TX detail panel now reads in plain UTXO terms instead of the misleading 'total input / total output' rows. A 1-SOST send that gathered four 1-SOST UTXOs used to show 'total input 4 SOST', which made it look like a 4-SOST transfer. The new layout reads: payment sent (X SOST), change returned (Y SOST), network fee (Z SOST + rate/size), inputs consumed (N UTXOs · gross), outputs created (M outputs · gross), with a microcopy line at the bottom explaining UTXO accounting in one sentence. Coinbase TXs collapse to 'block reward' + 'outputs created'. Transfers without a resolvable source say 'split unavailable' instead of inventing a number. Mempool TXs use the same shape, with a note that input amounts resolve once the TX is mined. Latest Transactions table is unchanged — AMOUNT still shows payment_amount, not total output. Force-reload (Ctrl+Shift+R).
